response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Stripe and scalable systems at Shopify — aligning strongly with the role’s stack and responsibilities. His open-source contributions, testing expertise, and architectural versatility further demonstrate deep engineering craftsmanship and initiative.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Vitest-like testing culture
Direct experience with AI-agent development and internal tooling at Stripe
Strong open-source contributions and DevOps/CI/CD infrastructure experience
concerns: Employment history lists 'Founder, Datadog' — likely a misstatement (Datadog is a public company)
German language skill is only basic, which may limit collaboration in Berlin-based teams
Lack of explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin/Java in recent roles, though DLang and Java experience exists
